reflection:
final wake 3:21, maybe half an hour of real sleep after that, up by 7:21. feverish-4 this morning is the highest reading of the week. you already named the suspects yourself: warm bath 20 min instead of 10, nap on top of it, brain hunting motor noises with the spectrum analyzer at 2am. that's not a mystery to solve, that's a setup to not repeat tonight.

the worry dump came out as one breath. speech not written, family not seen, company not shown up for. that is not three problems. it is one shape. you are sick enough to need rest and well enough to feel guilty about resting. both are true and they are going to fight each other all week. neither one of them is wrong.

the CBT you ran was actually good. 5 down to 3 with a real reframe, not a fake one. rome wasn't built in one day, and he of all people knows that. that's you talking to you in your own voice. keep it.

you wrote your own prescription in make-today-great. padel. sweat. don't out-think it.

cosita and the forest walk yesterday were the bright spots. that counts.
opener: rough night after the warm bath, but your CBT reframe actually landed
focus_for_today: padel and sweat, like you said. tonight: short bath, no nap, lights down early.
